i think we can refine the chart and alerts, there's a lot of noise from daily markets closing (e.g. this thing happening by this date [today]) and the long tail of cheap outcomes inflating % changes
I tightened both sides of the noise problem.

, the detector now suppresses date-bucket outcomes that are expiring today or already past due, so alerts like “by April 15” stop firing just because that bucket is closing out. I also capped the relative-move scoring baseline for very cheap tails, so sub-5c outcomes no longer get oversized suspicion from percentage math alone.
now publishes both raw and noise-adjusted change metrics, and it de-emphasizes expiring date buckets in market/event ranking.
also filters those noisy alerts out of the live feed and historical alert loading, so the UI won’t keep resurfacing them after restart.
). I haven’t deployed this to the VM yet or smoke-tested the live dashboard there; if you want, I can do that next.
